name: PHASE-42 owner-facing test-report endpoint (REAL HTTP): a built project with a materialized forge_tests/last_report.json -> GET /api/ai-os/project/test-report returns ok + overall_status + a non-empty per-scenario verdict array
_phase42_note: Locks the owner-evidence surface end-to-end on an in-process apiServer (isolated temp root + ephemeral port + token, S332 pattern). The isolated root cannot see the real _reference_todo_api report, so the helper MATERIALIZES forge_tests/last_report.json inside the temp project first, then GETs the endpoint. Endpoint sources the report via reg.invoke(builtproject.read_report) only (Track A). Contract: docs/09_verify/20_BUILT_PROJECT_TEST_CONTRACT.md §5.2.
